title: Nova's Bad Modpack
description: I put this up here so my friends can easily download it, if for some reason you want to, then you can.
body:
# Nova's Bad Modpack 
Bad modpack for me to play with my friends. It includes a variety of performance mods, tweaks to the vanilla experience, Multiplayer features, Biomes o' Plenty, ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village, CombatEdit, e4mc for easier multiplayer, FPS-Display, LazyDFU which improves the game's startup time, Profundis which adds some cave biomes, RyoamicLights for dynamic lights, stack which changes the stack sizes to 9999, Terrestria for more overworld biomes, Visuality for small visual changes, Zoomify to zoom, and Xaeros mini/world map.

###  This modpack is built on the Vital Modpack
[https://modrinth.com/modpack/vital](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vital)
### This modpack includes a variety of mods featured in The Vanilla Experience, if you want a great vanilla plus experience, check it out.
[https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-vanilla-experience](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-vanilla-experience)
### Biomes o' Plenty
[https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
